sleep.config.amount_to_sleep: Amount of players that have to sleep
sleep.config.afk_players_sleep: AFK players don't need to sleep
sleep.config.dimension_sleep: Players in other dimensions don't need to sleep
sleep.config.skip_condition.description: Choose between the amount of players or percentage of players that need to sleep
sleep.config.skip_condition.explanation: The setting you pick will determine which value is used
sleep.config.time_control.description: Choose between Night Skip or Night Warp
sleep.config.time_control.night_skip: Night Skip: The night ends instantly once the sleep requirement is met
sleep.config.time_control.night_warp: Night Warp: Time speeds up while players are in bed, and the night passes gradually over the configured duration
sleep.config.tick_accelerate.description: Only works if Night Warp is enabled
sleep.config.tick_accelerate.explanation: Its independent from the configured time, it increases the game tick rate
sleep.config.tick_accelerate.example: For example, furnaces smelt faster and crops grow faster
sleep.config.tick_accelerate.server_warn: Only works on servers with function-permission-level set to 3 (in server.properties)
